items.title: Hassett says authors of New York Fed tariff study should be disciplined: 'Worst paper I've ever seen'
items.description: The NEC director ripped the report, saying that central bank researchers ignored key aspects of how the duties worked

items.title: The 'boomcession': Why Americans feel left behind by a growing economy
items.description: A combination of the words "boom" and "recession" can help explain why Americans feel so sour about a growing economy.

items.title: UK inflation cools markedly in January, boosting odds of Bank of England rate cut
items.description: The U.K. inflation rate cooled to 3% in January, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).

items.title: Consumer prices rose 2.4% annually in January, less than expected
items.description: The consumer price index was expected to increase 2.5% from a year ago in January, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

items.title: The January CPI inflation report is due out Friday morning. Here's what it's expected to show
items.description: Investors got some good news this week on the state of the labor market, and more may be on the way Friday on inflation.
